languages.text: "Верно. У меня нет решения для проблемы Нунциуса. Если бы подобные материалы существовали, я бы ни за что не оставил их. Ни за что".
"No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."
languages.original_text: "Верно. У меня нет решения для проблемы Нунциуса. Если бы подобные материалы существовали, я бы ни за что не оставил их. Ни за что".

traits.locale_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."
"No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."
"No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

languages.text: «No, no había. No tengo la solución al problema de Nuncius. Si tuviera esos recursos, nunca los habría abandonado. Jamás».
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: «No, no había. No tengo la solución al problema de Nuncius. Si tuviera esos recursos, nunca los habría abandonado. Jamás».

languages.text: “是的，没有。我没有解决努恩修斯问题的办法。如果真有那样的材料存在，我绝不会把它们留在那里。绝对不会。”
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: “是的，没有。我没有解决努恩修斯问题的办法。如果真有那样的材料存在，我绝不会把它们留在那里。绝对不会。”

languages.text: « Non. Je n'ai pas trouvé de solution au problème de Nuncius. Si ces données existaient, je ne les aurais jamais abandonnées. Jamais. »
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: « Non. Je n'ai pas trouvé de solution au problème de Nuncius. Si ces données existaient, je ne les aurais jamais abandonnées. Jamais. »

languages.text: "Hayır, yok. Nuncius'un sorununa bir çözümüm yok. Eğer böyle şeyler olsaydı onları asla geride bırakmazdım. Asla."
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: "Hayır, yok. Nuncius'un sorununa bir çözümüm yok. Eğer böyle şeyler olsaydı onları asla geride bırakmazdım. Asla."

languages.text: "Nein. Ich habe keine Lösung für Nuncius' Problem. Hätten derartige Materialien existiert, hätte ich sie niemals zurückgelassen. Niemals."
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: "Nein. Ich habe keine Lösung für Nuncius' Problem. Hätten derartige Materialien existiert, hätte ich sie niemals zurückgelassen. Niemals."

languages.text: 「いや、なかった。ヌンキウスの問題の解決策は持っていない。もし、そのような資料があったとしても、私は決して残したりしなかったでしょう。決して」
languages.original_text: "No, there was not. I do not have a solution to Nuncius's problem. If such materials had existed, I never would have left them behind. Never."

traits.locale_text: 「いや、なかった。ヌンキウスの問題の解決策は持っていない。もし、そのような資料があったとしても、私は決して残したりしなかったでしょう。決して」
